title: Apple iPhone 15 Pro Max
description: Experience the ultimate smartphone with A17 Pro chip, titanium design, and a 48MP main camera. Capture the world in incredible detail and enjoy all-day battery life.

title: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra
description: Welcome to the era of mobile AI. With Galaxy S24 Ultra in your hands, you can unleash whole new levels of creativity, productivity and possibility.

title: Sony WH-1000XM5 Headphones
description: Industry-leading noise cancellation. Two processors control 8 microphones for unprecedented noise cancellation. With Auto NC Optimizer, noise canceling is automatically optimized.

title: MacBook Pro 16-inch M3 Max
description: Mind-blowing. Head-turning. The most advanced Mac ever built with the M3 Max chip. Enjoy a stunning Liquid Retina XDR display and amazing battery life.

title: Dell XPS 15 OLED Laptop
description: 15.6-inch 3.5K OLED touch display, Intel Core i9 processor, NVIDIA RTX 4070 graphics. Built for creators who need desktop-level performance in a laptop.

title: Apple Watch Ultra 2
description: The most rugged and capable Apple Watch pushes the limits again. Featuring the all-new S9 SiP. A magical new way to use your watch without touching the screen.

title: PlayStation 5 Console
description: Experience lightning-fast loading with an ultra-high speed SSD, deeper immersion with support for haptic feedback, adaptive triggers, and 3D Audio.

title: Nike Air Force 1 '07
description: The radiance lives on in the Nike Air Force 1 '07, the b-ball icon that puts a fresh spin on what you know best: crisp leather, bold colors and the perfect amount of flash.

title: LG C3 65-inch OLED TV
description: The LG OLED evo C-Series is powered by the a9 AI Processor Gen6—made exclusively for LG OLED. It delivers beautiful picture and performance.

title: DJI Mini 4 Pro Drone
description: Mini 4 Pro is our most advanced mini-camera drone to date. It integrates powerful imaging capabilities, omnidirectional obstacle sensing, and ActiveTrack 360°.
